experiment_title: Carboxylic Acid Acidity Comparison via Litmus and Reaction with Bases

data.xdl_enriched:
<XDL>
  <Metadata title="Carboxylic Acid Acidity Comparison via Litmus and Reaction with Bases" goal="Compare the acidity of formic acid, benzoic acid, and acetic acid by observing litmus color change and reaction vigor with sodium carbonate, sodium bicarbonate, and sodium phenoxide solutions." difficulty="Normal" />
  <Synthesis>
    <Hardware>
      <Component id="test_tube_1" type="test_tube" />
      <Component id="test_tube_2" type="test_tube" />
      <Component id="test_tube_3" type="test_tube" />
      <Component id="litmus_dropper" type="dropper" />
      <Component id="flask_1" type="erlenmeyer_flask" capacity="100ml" />
      <Component id="flask_2" type="erlenmeyer_flask" capacity="100ml" />
      <Component id="flask_3" type="erlenmeyer_flask" capacity="100ml" />
      <Component id="separatory_funnel_1" type="separatory_funnel" />
      <Component id="separatory_funnel_2" type="separatory_funnel" />
      <Component id="separatory_funnel_3" type="separatory_funnel" />
    </Hardware>
    <Reagents>
      <Reagent name="formic_acid_solution" state="liquid" />
      <Reagent name="benzoic_acid_solution" state="liquid" />
      <Reagent name="acetic_acid_solution" state="liquid" />
      <Reagent name="litmus_solution" state="liquid" />
      <Reagent name="sodium_carbonate_solution" state="liquid" />
      <Reagent name="sodium_bicarbonate_solution" state="liquid" />
      <Reagent name="sodium_phenoxide_solution" state="liquid" />
      <Reagent name="water" state="liquid" />
    </Reagents>
    <Procedure>
      
      <Add vessel="test_tube_1" reagent="HCOOH" volume="2 mL" id="step_0" />
      <Add vessel="test_tube_2" reagent="C6H5COOH" volume="2 mL" id="step_1" />
      <Add vessel="test_tube_3" reagent="CH3COOH" volume="2 mL" id="step_2" />
      
      <Add vessel="test_tube_1" reagent="Litmus" volume="3 drops" tool="litmus_dropper" id="step_3" />
      <Add vessel="test_tube_2" reagent="Litmus" volume="3 drops" tool="litmus_dropper" id="step_4" />
      <Add vessel="test_tube_3" reagent="Litmus" volume="3 drops" tool="litmus_dropper" id="step_5" />
      
      <Wait time="30s" id="step_6" />
      
      <Add vessel="flask_1" reagent="Na2CO3" volume="20 mL" id="step_7" />
      <Add vessel="flask_2" reagent="NaHCO3" volume="20 mL" id="step_8" />
      <Add vessel="flask_3" reagent="C6H5ONa" volume="20 mL" id="step_9" />
      
      <Attach vessel="separatory_funnel_1" support="flask_1" id="step_10" />
      <Attach vessel="separatory_funnel_2" support="flask_2" id="step_11" />
      <Attach vessel="separatory_funnel_3" support="flask_3" id="step_12" />
      
      <Add vessel="separatory_funnel_1" reagent="CH3COOH" volume="20 mL" id="step_13" />
      <Add vessel="separatory_funnel_2" reagent="CH3COOH" volume="20 mL" id="step_14" />
      <Add vessel="separatory_funnel_3" reagent="CH3COOH" volume="20 mL" id="step_15" />
      
      <Wait time="30s" id="step_16" />
      
    </Procedure>
  </Synthesis>
</XDL>

graph_nodes.description: 分别向三个试管中加入甲酸、苯甲酸和乙酸溶液，准备待测酸样品。
向各试管中分别加入石蕊试液，观察颜色变化，比较三种酸的酸性强弱。
分别向三个锥形瓶中加入碳酸钠、碳酸氢钠和苯酚钠溶液，准备与酸反应的碱性溶液。
将分液漏斗分别安装在三个锥形瓶上，为后续酸碱反应做准备。
分别向三个分液漏斗中加入乙酸溶液，与不同碱性溶液反应，观察反应剧烈程度以进一步比较酸性强弱。
